warnings.message: Some adjacent EPUB paragraphs look like possible faulty line or page breaks
Some list or roman markers appear embedded in prose instead of starting their own paragraph
Some EPUB enumerators look like possible sequence jumps and need triage
Repeated word windows may indicate ghost-layer duplication
Some dense Hebrew passages from the PDF are missing from the EPUB
A significant portion of Latin words in the EPUB are not wrapped in language spans
Some dense Latin passages from the PDF are missing from the EPUB
Some tagged Latin phrases in the EPUB do not have matching modern translations in translation_db.py

split_candidates.previous: Now, let us consider hence some further observations:—

split_candidates.previous: Again, observe that,—

split_candidates.previous: Furthermore, from the exposition before premised we may observe, that,—
split_candidates.next: Obs. XXIV. No privilege, no outward means of grace, no other advantage whatever, will secure men in a course of sinning from the wrath and justice of God.

1. That those that preach it are sent of God; 2. That what is preached be according to the analogy of faith; 3. That it be drawn from the written word; 4. That it be delivered in the name and authority of God.

To complete our profession, yea, to constitute our ὁμολογία , there is required that we make a solemn declaration of our subjection unto the gospel in these things. And this is made two ways. (1.) By works. (2.) By words.
